attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.SAF_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.SAF_INVOICE_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.PERCENTAGE, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.TAX_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.QUANTITY, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.TOTAL_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.LINE_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.REBILL_YN, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.TERMINATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL,
(
 select SAF_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL
 minus
 select SAF_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SAF_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.SAF_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXICM_SAF_LINES_ALL)
